name: forgecode_agent_composition
description: ForgeCode assimilation template that composes three specialized agent lanes (research, planning, implementation) into one single-agent master workflow.

subtemplates.description: Structured ForgeCode lane that projects raw tool-call runtime mechanics (argument normalization, parser resilience, ordering) into staged research/plan/implement flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects tool-service execution mechanics (fetch safety, followup gating, patch strictness, read/search bounds, shell hygiene) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects mutation/recovery and operator-planning mechanics (remove/undo/write/image-read/plan-create/skill-fetch) into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects MCP capability management mechanics (scope merge, cached re-init, tool alias routing, failure diagnostics, and module validation) into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects domain-level context compaction and response event mechanics (threshold validation, safe eviction boundaries, and event emptiness/interrupt semantics) into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects request/command/event/attachment domain mechanics (conversation identity binding, dispatch metadata, and file-tag parsing constraints) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects auth flow and credential domain mechanics (method selection, OAuth config/token envelopes, and credential refresh semantics) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects permission policy evaluation mechanics (policy sets, rule matching, and default/short-circuit decisions) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects provider/model/transport configuration mechanics (typed auth keys, provider identity/model source, and HTTP/TLS defaults) into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects context transformer mechanics (tool-argument normalization, image attachment rewrite, reasoning stripping, and model projection) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects tool-catalog/definition mechanics and transform-to-non-tool context conversion behavior into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects tool namespace exports, tool-name hygiene, and MCP server config/cache mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects message accounting, reasoning aggregation, suggestion/context envelopes, and template-driven synthesis mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects agent/runtime config, lifecycle hooks, session metrics, terminal/workspace context, and validation contracts into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects file metadata/sync surfaces, fuzzy match ranges, line-number rendering, merge helpers, and streaming aggregation utilities into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects repository interface contracts, shell/console output invariants, skill envelopes, XML tag hygiene, and conversation HTML rendering surfaces into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects environment/config mutation paths, domain error envelopes, image payload handling, and bounded sampling parameter contracts into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects data generation parameters, migration results, indexing/sync lifecycle envelopes, point/snapshot models, and update cadence contracts into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects compact module exports, canonical tool-call fixture envelopes, policy type semantics, and top-k bound contracts into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects config precision, bounded percentage/compact semantics, reader path resolution, and reasoning/http envelopes into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects legacy config migration, retry envelopes, error channels, model pairing, and schema-prefixed config writer semantics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects CI job execution sequencing, release update delegation, permissions, and lint command generation into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects release build/distribution job mechanics across matrix builds, release drafting, and downstream package/formula publishing into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects infra authentication strategy/error/http-provider mechanics into staged orchestration flow with explicit provider-quirk handling and credential enrichment behavior.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects infra auth utility, MCP credential store, and rmcp token-storage lifecycle mechanics into staged orchestration flow with fail-closed token parsing and durable credential persistence behavior.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects infra environment/config mutation, synchronized console output, and shell command execution/streaming mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects infra filesystem directory creation, metadata probing, bounded directory reads, and batched file-read mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects infra filesystem mutation and bounded workspace-walk mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects infra composition, gRPC/HTTP transport behavior, and interactive user prompt mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects infra cache durability, MCP server client-binding, and ForgeFS read/write primitives into staged orchestration flow.
Read-only deep research lane adapted from ForgeCode `sage` to map architecture/data flow and emit structured findings before planning or implementation.
Strategic planning lane adapted from ForgeCode `muse` that emits a checklist-first implementation plan with verification criteria and explicit risk/mitigation notes.
Hands-on implementation lane adapted from ForgeCode `forge` that executes concrete mutations with bounded validation and concise handoff synthesis.
Task-dispatch orchestration lane adapted from ForgeCode task tooling guidance to enforce role-specific dispatch, safe parallelization, and deterministic integration before final emit.

Tool-selection hierarchy lane adapted from ForgeCode guidance to enforce semantic-first discovery, precise pattern search for exact symbols, known-path direct reads, and parallelized independent tool calls.

Grounded-response and progress-hygiene lane adapted from ForgeCode guidance to require tool-grounded verification before final synthesis, explicit step checkpoints, and completion claims only after execution plus validation.

Specialized-tool-usage lane adapted from ForgeCode guidance to prefer dedicated read/search/edit tooling over shell fallbacks, reserve shell for true terminal operations, and keep simple lookups local instead of dispatching subagents.
Subagent-brief hygiene lane adapted from ForgeCode guidance to require explicit task mode (implement vs research), output contract, and deterministic result synthesis before operator emit.

Plan artifact discipline lane adapted from ForgeCode planning guidance to require plan-first workflow with checkbox tasks, measurable verification criteria, risk/alternative sections, and explicit plan validation.

Reasoning-provider matrix lane adapted from ForgeCode reasoning tests to require provider-specific reasoning field mapping checks, payload capture, and invalid-effort rejection guards before claims of reasoning compatibility.
CLI debug regression loop lane adapted from ForgeCode debug-cli guidance to require help-surface refresh, prompt-mode reproduction, and conversation dump/clone hygiene before and after fixes.

Conflict-resolution plan-first lane adapted from ForgeCode merge guidance to require approved resolution plans, generated-file regeneration, deleted/modified backups, and explicit operator options for ambiguous conflicts.

Anthropic request-transform safety lane adapted from ForgeCode provider transforms to enforce auth preamble insertion, tool-name normalization, schema strictness, and tool-call payload/id sanitization.

Anthropic DTO contract lane adapted from ForgeCode request/response and transform-registry surfaces to enforce reasoning-safe request shaping and deterministic usage/finish-model projection semantics.
Provider cache/output compatibility lane adapted from ForgeCode Anthropic cache/output transforms and Google DTO request/response surfaces.
OpenAI DTO contract lane adapted from ForgeCode openai error/model/request/response surfaces to enforce provider-safe request shaping and response projection reliability.
OpenAI transform-pipeline lane adapted from ForgeCode tool-choice and transformer pipeline surfaces to enforce provider/model-gated transformation ordering and compatibility normalizations.
OpenAI provider-compatibility transform lane adapted from ForgeCode provider-specific transform surfaces for mistral/copilot/kimi/cerebras/openai/xai compatibility.
OpenAI provider tuning/selection transform lane adapted from ForgeCode provider-specific cache/reasoning/tool-choice and model-matcher transform surfaces.
OpenAI fixture corpus lane adapted from ForgeCode fixture surfaces to enforce pricing-shape tolerance, fail-closed invalid pricing handling, and streaming reasoning projection invariants.

OpenAI fixture error-edge lane adapted from ForgeCode fixture and snapshot surfaces to enforce multi-provider error envelope normalization, scientific-notation pricing parse tolerance, and assistant tool-call projection invariants.
OpenAI request-snapshot lane adapted from ForgeCode request conversion snapshots to enforce role/content projection stability across special characters, embedded markup, and tool payload envelopes.

OpenAI request-snapshot content/escape lane adapted from ForgeCode request conversion snapshots to enforce special-character, markup, and escaped-code literal preservation across user/tool message projection surfaces.
Prompt/context generation lane adapted from ForgeCode app surfaces to enforce deterministic tool-catalog projection, template-helper stability, and user/system prompt context-shaping contracts.

Compaction/operation-output lane adapted from ForgeCode app runtime surfaces to enforce context-compaction reasoning preservation, tool-operation output projection fidelity, bounded walker defaults, and schema-driven data generation contracts.

Hook lifecycle lane adapted from ForgeCode app hook surfaces to enforce deterministic hook sequencing, doom-loop guardrails, todo-state projection, bounded title synthesis, and tracing visibility contracts.

Agent runtime lane adapted from ForgeCode app orchestration surfaces to enforce lane-aware agent execution, provider resolution discipline, tunable parameter bounds, and actionable runtime error projection.

Orchestration spec lane adapted from ForgeCode orchestration-spec surfaces to enforce deterministic orchestrator setup/run sequencing, system-spec handshake integrity, and bounded workflow runner behavior.

Context transformer lane adapted from ForgeCode transformer surfaces to enforce deterministic context normalization, role deduplication, reasoning-only pruning, and model-specific reasoning projection boundaries.

Truncation/context-hygiene lane adapted from ForgeCode truncation and transformer surfaces to enforce bounded output envelopes, modality-aware truncation behavior, and working-directory context hygiene.
Formatting/todo-render lane adapted from ForgeCode fmt surfaces to enforce deterministic input/output render normalization, content-shape consistency, and todo presentation fidelity.

Workspace-state tracking lane adapted from ForgeCode app state surfaces to enforce deterministic file-change accounting, conversation identity continuity, terminal context shaping, and workspace-status projection fidelity.
App/infra/service bootstrap lane adapted from ForgeCode runtime surfaces to enforce deterministic app wiring, service graph stability, metrics initialization, and utility boundary hygiene.

User/fixture projection lane adapted from ForgeCode user and fixture corpus surfaces to enforce deterministic user-context shaping, title generation bounds, and fixture-backed workspace projection fidelity.
CI workflow engine lane adapted from ForgeCode Rust workflow surfaces to enforce deterministic workflow synthesis, policy-safe automation defaults, and release-governance pipeline integrity.
Single-agent composed workflow that sequences Sage-style research, Muse-style planning, and Forge-style implementation behind one interface.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects ForgeFS core hashing, binary detection, file-size probing, and typed error channels into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects JSON repair parsing and schema-aware coercion mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects display/render formatting mechanics (syntax-highlighted code blocks, diff output, grep formatting, markdown rendering) into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects main CLI/input/render mechanics (command surface, prompt-loop parsing, tool availability projection, and streaming spinner-safe output) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects main command manager, prompt composition, UI state envelope, and tracker dispatch mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects main completer mechanics (command completion, input completion, search-term extraction, and module export boundaries) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects main editor/highlighter/display-constants/utils mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects main banner/info/title/sync display mechanics into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects zsh integration mechanics (plugin/theme generation, setup/doctor flows, pasted-path wrapping, and zsh-native prompt style rendering) into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects service-layer state mechanics (active-agent cache, latest config reads, service auth fetches, workspace sync/index lookup, and conversation persistence mutation) into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects workspace attachment, clipping, command loading, and file discovery mechanics into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects typed service errors, git-first file discovery, walker fallback, source filtering, and service-container composition into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects custom-instruction discovery, service module boundaries, metadata rendering, default policy compatibility, and user-confirmed policy mutation into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects provider authentication, provider URL rendering, line-range normalization, workspace sync, and template registration mechanics into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects service utility export boundaries, absolute-path validation, canonical temporary directory fixtures, and app formatting snapshot expectations into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects removed todo rendering and orchestration system-prompt snapshot mechanics into staged orchestration flow.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects truncated workspace prompt context, external-change warnings, command-generation request envelopes, and compaction summary-frame contracts into staged orchestration flow.
Structured ForgeCode lane that projects repository test-profile, devcontainer, line-ending, ignore, and autocomplete-noise policies into staged assimilation workflow environment contracts.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects formatting policy, agent contribution rules, workspace dependency/lockfile integrity, and cross-build reproducibility into staged assimilation workflow contracts.

Structured ForgeCode lane that projects license governance, docs-site configuration, byte-decoding lint policy, PR-description command templating, and app-crate dependency boundaries into staged assimilation workflow contracts.
